getStarted.description: Complete these steps to make the most of Masumi.

metadata.title: Welcome to Masumi
metadata.description: A quick tour before you get started.

welcome.title: Welcome to Masumi
welcome.description: Masumi is the payment network for AI agents. Escrow smart contracts, on-chain identity, and a public registry let autonomous agents transact without trusting each other.

agents.title: Register on the Masumi network
agents.description: Add your agent's API, pricing, and metadata. Masumi registers it on-chain so buyers can discover your service and pay through escrow-protected jobs.

organizations.title: Organizations & verification
organizations.description: Create or join a workspace for your team—or work solo. Identity verification is per-user and separate from org setup: complete it when you are ready for mainnet, and verified agents receive a verifiable credential on the network.

payments.title: Credits & integrations
payments.description: Test on preprod for free. When you switch to mainnet, credits cover registration and other paid platform actions. Connect your stack with API keys or OIDC grants.

errors.FailedToComplete: Failed to complete onboarding. Please try again.

TopUp.title: Top up
TopUp.description: Buy credits for mainnet usage and keep your account ready for paid actions.
TopUp.balanceDescription: Your current balance is ready to use whenever you perform credit-backed actions on Mainnet.
TopUp.mainnetOnlyDescription: Preprod and any missing or invalid network values never deduct credits. Your balance only decreases for write operations on Mainnet.
TopUp.roadmapDescription: We're preparing a self-serve top-up flow directly inside Masumi.
TopUp.roadmapBilling: Secure checkout with instant credit delivery
TopUp.roadmapAlerts: Low-balance reminders before you run out

Withdraw.title: Withdraw
Withdraw.description: Withdraw your earnings to your preferred payout method.
Withdraw.comingSoonDescription: We're working on payout integrations. Check back here once they're live.

Analytics.title: Analytics
Analytics.description: Revenue, usage, and performance across your agents.

Earnings.title: Earnings
Earnings.description: Track income, refunds, and pending payouts for one agent at a time on the selected network.
Earnings.filtersDescription: Pick an eligible agent and time window. The network comes from the global switcher in the sidebar.
Earnings.searchAgentsPlaceholder: Search agents by name or identifier...
Earnings.loadAgentsHelp: Try refreshing or switch networks if you expect this agent to be visible elsewhere.
Earnings.loadEarningsHelp: Refresh the page or pick a different range to try again.
Earnings.emptyTitle: No eligible agents on this network
Earnings.emptyDescription: This network does not have any wallet-owned agents with earnings history yet. Register an agent or switch networks to continue.
Earnings.transactionsHint: Payment requests included in this period
Earnings.noDataTitle: No earnings yet in this period
Earnings.noDataDescription: When this agent starts receiving payments, the selected metric will appear here with a timeline and breakdown.
Earnings.mixedUnitsTitle: Chart unavailable for mixed payment units
Earnings.mixedUnitsDescription: This metric includes both USD stablecoins and ADA in the selected period. Use the breakdown table below to inspect the exact amounts.
Earnings.breakdownEmpty: There is no breakdown data for this metric yet.

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Recent transactions and agent lifecycle events across your agents.
Activity.noActivity: No activity yet. Register agents and complete transactions to see them here.
Activity.noEarnings: Earnings will appear here when your agents receive payments.
Activity.searchPlaceholder: Search by agent, type, status, amount...

X402.title: x402
X402.description: Manage chains, wallets, and x402 payments.

Chains.description: EVM chains available to the x402 payment rail. Testnet chains pair with the Preprod environment.
Chains.emptyDescription: Add an EVM chain to start accepting x402 payments.
Chains.dialogDescription: Configure an EVM chain for the x402 payment rail.
Chains.dialogDescriptionLocked: Only {evmEnvironment} EVM chains can be added while that environment is selected.
Chains.chainEnvironmentMismatch: This chain is not valid for {evmEnvironment} EVM. Choose a preset from the list.
Chains.facilitatorHint: Signs settlements for inbound payments on this chain. Required to enable the chain.
Chains.testnetHint: Testnet chains for development and staging.
Chains.environmentLockedHint: Locked to {evmEnvironment}. Use the sidebar toggle to add chains in the other environment.
Chains.chainPresetsAria: Choose a common EVM chain preset
Chains.enabledHint: Allow x402 payments on this chain.

Wallets.description: Managed EVM wallets are split by direction: Purchasing wallets fund outbound x402 payments, Selling wallets settle inbound ones as chain facilitators.
Wallets.emptyDescription: Create a wallet to fund and settle x402 payments.
Wallets.retireDescription: This disables the wallet's budgets and detaches it from any chain it facilitates. This cannot be undone.
Wallets.createDescription: Wallets are split by direction. Keys are encrypted at rest and never leave the server.
Wallets.purchasingHint: Funds outbound payments (budgets) — the buy side.
Wallets.sellingHint: Settles inbound payments as a chain facilitator — the sell side.
Wallets.generateHint: A fresh keypair is generated on the server. You will see the private key once after creation.
Wallets.importHint: Imported keys are stored encrypted and are never shown again.
Wallets.invalidPrivateKey: Private key must be a 0x-prefixed 32-byte hex string
Wallets.missingPrivateKey: Wallet was created but its private key was not returned. Retire it and create a new one.
Wallets.backupDescription: Store this key securely. You need it to recover the wallet.
Wallets.backupWarning: Never share this key. Anyone who has it can move this wallet's funds.
Wallets.backupConfirm: I have saved this private key in a secure place.
Wallets.downloadDescription: This saves your private key as an unencrypted .txt file. Continue only if you will store it securely.
Wallets.balanceEmpty: No enabled chains to read balances from.

Budgets.description: Per-API-key spend limits for managed wallets. Amounts are in the token's base units.
Budgets.emptyDescription: Grant an API key a spend budget against a Purchasing wallet.
Budgets.dialogDescription: Grant an API key a spendable budget against a managed wallet for a specific chain and token.
Budgets.assetHint: ERC-20 contract for the token you pay with over x402. Must match the asset in payment requirements — use a preset or your chain default.
Budgets.noApiKeys: Create an API key to attach budgets to programmatic clients.
Budgets.apiKeyCreated: API key created — copy it now; it won't be shown again.
Budgets.manageApiKeysHint: You can also manage keys at

Alerts.description: Get alerted when a managed wallet runs low. Alerts fire as webhooks.
Alerts.emptyDescription: Add a low-balance alert so a wallet running out of gas or tokens does not silently break settlement.
Alerts.deleteDescription: This removes the alert rule for this wallet and asset on this chain.
Alerts.dialogDescription: Alert when a wallet's balance for an asset drops below a threshold.

Payments.description: Every x402 payment this service signed or verified and settled, newest first.
Payments.emptyDescription: x402 verify, settle and fetch attempts will appear here.
Payments.detailsDescription: x402 payment attempt and its settlement result.

SetupGuide.title: Set up the x402 EVM rail
SetupGuide.description: The x402 rail lets your agents pay — and get paid by — other agents over EVM chains using stablecoins.
SetupGuide.receivingBody: Create a Selling wallet and assign it as a chain facilitator so your agents can be paid over x402.
SetupGuide.payingBody: Create a Purchasing wallet and grant an org API key a capped budget. Optional if you only receive payments.

SetupBanner.title: Set up the x402 (EVM) rail for {environment}
SetupBanner.description: Let your agents pay — and get paid by — other agents over EVM chains using stablecoins.

Setup.pageDescription: Guided setup for the x402 EVM payment rail.
Setup.welcomeDescription: Let your agents pay and get paid over EVM chains on {environment}.
Setup.walletStepDescription: Create a managed Selling wallet. It signs settlements as the chain facilitator.
Setup.facilitatorStepDescription: Set your Selling wallet as facilitator on a {environment} EVM chain.
Setup.walletRequiredFirst: Create a Selling wallet in the previous step first.
Setup.receivingDescription: Add a Selling wallet and set it as facilitator on a {environment} EVM chain.
Setup.facilitatorWrongEnvironment: Facilitator is on {chain} ({chainEnv}), but this setup is for {environment}. Add a {environment} chain below.
Setup.assignFacilitatorHint: Assign your Selling wallet as a chain facilitator to start receiving.
Setup.createSellingHint: Create a Selling wallet to act as the chain facilitator.
Setup.payingDescription: Create a Purchasing wallet and grant an org API key a capped budget.
Setup.setBudgetHint: Grant an org API key a spend budget on your Purchasing wallet.
Setup.createPurchasingHint: Create a Purchasing wallet to fund outbound payments.
Setup.readyDescription: Your {environment} EVM rail is ready to use

Verification.title: Identity Verification
Verification.description: Complete your identity verification to unlock full access to Masumi.

errors.consentRequired: Please accept the consent to proceed
errors.tokenGenerationFailed: Failed to generate verification token. Please try again.

Intro.purpose: Identity verification is required for compliance and to enable agent monetization features. This helps us maintain trust and security across the platform.
Intro.gdpr: We follow GDPR principles and only collect the minimum data necessary for verification. Your data is processed securely and will be retained according to our privacy policy.
Intro.biometric: The verification process includes biometric checks (selfie and liveness detection) to ensure you are a real person matching your identity documents.
Intro.credential: Upon successful verification, a credential will be issued to your account. This credential enables you to use advanced features and can be shared with your consent.
Intro.consentLabel: I understand and consent to the identity verification process.

Verification.description: Please complete the verification steps below. You'll need to upload an identity document and take a selfie.
Verification.error: An error occurred during verification. Please try again.

Completion.successMessage: Your verification has been submitted successfully. We'll review it and notify you once it's complete.
Completion.processingMessage: Your verification is being processed. This may take a few moments.
Completion.rejectedMessage: Your verification was rejected. Please review the reason above and try again.

Agents.description: Manage your AI agents and discover registry listings.

Register.title: Register New Agent
Register.iconDescription: Choose an icon for your agent or upload a custom one.
Register.iconLoadError: Failed to load icon. Please check the URL and try again.
Register.iconTooltip: The icon represents your agent in the marketplace.
Register.name: Name
Register.nameMaxLength: Name must be less than 250 characters
Register.descriptionPlaceholder: Short description of what your agent does (max 250 characters)
Register.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be 250 characters or less
Register.extendedDescriptionPlaceholder: Optional additional details about your agent
Register.extendedDescriptionMaxLength: Extended description must be less than 5000 characters
Register.descriptionRichTextHint: A detailed overview — research examples, limitations, use cases, etc. Supports rich text formatting.
Register.apiUrlInvalid: API URL must be a valid URL
Register.apiUrlProtocol: API URL must start with http:// or https://
Register.runtimeLangdockDescription: Masumi hosts the wrapper and connects to Langdock.
Register.pricingFreeDescription: No charge for interactions through Masumi.
Register.pricingFixedDescription: Set USD amounts now; buyers pay those fixed rates.
Register.pricingDynamicDescription: No amounts at registration — pricing is set per job or purchase.
Register.pricingDynamicContext: Choose Dynamic when your agent negotiates or quotes a price per request (for example via your MIP/API). Buyers see "Dynamic" in discovery; exact amounts are agreed when they start a payment or purchase flow.
Register.tagsRequired: At least one tag is required.
Register.termsOfUseUrlPlaceholder: Enter the terms of use URL
Register.error: Failed to register agent. Please try again.
Register.fundingWallet: Funding wallet — we'll complete registration in a moment.
Register.closeConfirmDescription: Registration will continue in the background. Close anyway?
Register.registrationStarted: Registration started. We'll notify you when it's done.
Register.x402Description: Advertise EVM/x402 payment rails alongside Cardano pricing.

Edit.error: Failed to update agent. Please try again.

Details.verificationPromptDescription: This agent is not verified yet. Request a credential to link your verified KYC status and establish trust.
Details.registeringAgent: Registering agent. This may take a few moments.
Details.deregisterDescription: Deregistering will remove this agent from the marketplace. It will stop accepting new payments.
Details.deregisterSuccess: Deregistering agent. This may take a few moments.
Details.deregisterError: Failed to deregister agent. Please try again.
Details.deregisterConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to deregister {name}? It will be removed from the marketplace and stop accepting new payments.
Details.deleteDescription: Once you delete an agent there is no going back.
Details.deleteStuckDescription: Agent seems to be stuck in registration. You can delete it and try again.
Details.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

networkMismatch.title: Switch Network
networkMismatch.description: This agent is on {agentNetwork}, but you’re currently on {currentNetwork}. Switch networks to view this agent.

Earnings.title: Summary
Earnings.noEarningsData: No earnings in this period yet. Revenue will appear here when this agent receives payments.

pending.title: No Credential Issued
pending.description: This agent has not been verified yet. Request verification to link your verified identity to this agent.

review.title: Verification Under Review
review.description: Your verification request is being processed. This may take a few moments.

approved.title: Agent Verified
approved.description: This agent has been successfully verified with your KYC status.

verified.title: Agent Verified
verified.description: This agent's identity has been verified on the Masumi network.

revoked.title: Verification Revoked
revoked.description: The verification for this agent has been revoked. You can request new verification.

expired.title: Verification Expired
expired.description: The verification for this agent has expired. You can request new verification.

credentialSummary.loadError: Could not load verification details. Try refreshing the page.
credentialSummary.emptyHint: No stored credential metadata was found for this agent.
credentialSummary.pendingPlaceholder: This credential row is waiting for issuance to complete.
credentialSummary.claimedRegistryAgentId: Registry agent ID claimed in VC
credentialSummary.registryMatch: Registry agent ID in the VC matches this agent.
credentialSummary.registryMismatch: Registry agent ID in the VC differs from this agent — metadata may have changed since issuance.

rejected.title: Verification Rejected
rejected.description: Verification was rejected. You can try requesting verification again.

Verification.tooltipRequestCredentialRequiresRegistra: Finish on-chain registration for this agent first. You can request a credential only after registration is confirmed.
Verification.requestDescription: Review the information below and confirm to issue a Verifiable Credential for this agent.
Verification.kycStatusDescription: Your identity has been verified and approved.
Verification.kycStatusPendingDescription: Please complete your KYC verification first.
Verification.kycStatusReviewDescription: Your KYC verification is being processed.
Verification.kycStatusRejectedDescription: Your KYC verification was rejected. Please complete it again.
Verification.credentialDescription: A Verifiable Credential will be issued linking your verified KYC status to this agent. This credential can be used to verify the agent's authenticity.
Verification.requestError: Failed to issue credential. Please try again.
Verification.acceptanceTimeout: Timed out waiting for acceptance in wallet. You can close and try again.
Verification.waitingForWalletDescription: Please open your Veridian wallet and accept the incoming credential offer.
Verification.credentialServerInstructions: Scan the issuer QR code in Veridian (Menu → Cardano Connect → Connect). Then paste the OOBI copied from your wallet below. If you already linked this wallet to the issuer, switch to paste your AID only.
Verification.invalidOobi: Could not parse an AID from that OOBI. Check the URL format.
Verification.connectionNotEstablished: Connection not established. The credential server needs to know about your AID before issuing credentials.
Verification.connectionEstablished: Connection established. Ready to issue credentials.
Verification.establishConnectionDescription: To receive credentials, you need to establish a connection with the credential server. Scan the QR code below with your Veridian wallet to complete the connection.
Verification.scanIssuerQRCode: Scan this QR code with your Veridian wallet
Verification.failedToLoadIssuerOobi: Failed to load issuer connection QR code. Please try again.
Verification.connectionStillNotEstablished: Connection still not established. Please scan the QR code and try again.
Verification.failedToCheckConnection: Failed to check connection. Please try again.
Verification.agentVerificationDescription: Add the secret to your agent's environment and implement the endpoint below. This proves you control the agent's backend.
Verification.agentVerificationSecretHint: Add this to your agent's .env as MASUMI_VERIFICATION_SECRET. Keep it private.
Verification.agentVerificationHint: Your agent must respond to GET /get-credential?masumi_challenge=[challenge] and return HMAC-SHA256(challenge, secret).
Verification.challengeRegenerated: New secret generated. Update MASUMI_VERIFICATION_SECRET in your agent.
Verification.agentErrorHint: If your agent is unreachable or returns the wrong signature, ensure MASUMI_VERIFICATION_SECRET matches. Or generate a new secret.
Verification.tooltipAgentVerification: Proves you control this agent's backend. Your agent must return HMAC-SHA256(challenge, secret) to pass verification.
Verification.tooltipVerificationSecret: A shared secret used to prove your agent knows it. Only your agent can produce the correct HMAC response. Never expose it publicly.
Verification.tooltipIntegrationCode: Add this endpoint to your agent. It receives a challenge and returns HMAC-SHA256(challenge, secret) to prove you control the backend.
Verification.tooltipGenerateNewSecret: Use if the secret was exposed or you need to rotate it. Update your agent's environment with the new secret.
Verification.tooltipKycStatus: Your identity must be verified before we can issue a credential linking you to this agent.
Verification.tooltipVeridianWalletConnection: Link the Veridian wallet that will receive the credential: scan the issuer QR, paste your OOBI, or paste your AID if already linked.
Verification.tooltipIdentifierAid: Your unique identifier (AID) in the Veridian system. Used to issue and verify credentials.
Verification.tooltipEstablishConnection: The credential server must recognize your AID before issuing. Scanning the issuer QR and resolving your OOBI establishes that mutual connection.
Verification.tooltipWhatWillBeIssued: A Veridian credential that links your verified identity to this agent. Others can verify the agent is authentic.
Verification.stepWalletSetupDescription: Install and configure the Veridian wallet on your mobile device.

walletSetup.title: Set Up Veridian Wallet
walletSetup.description: You need the Veridian wallet app to receive verification credentials. If you already have it configured, click Next to skip this step.
walletSetup.installDescription: Download the Veridian wallet app from the App Store or Google Play.
walletSetup.osRequirements:
Only the following operating system versions are supported; any earlier versions no longer receive security updates.

iOS: Version 18.0 — Crystal
Android: Version 14 — Upside Down Cake (API level 34)
walletSetup.configureDescription: Open Veridian → Settings → Add KERIA Connection, then paste the URLs below.

Verification.stepEndpointDescription: Add the verification secret to your agent and implement the endpoint.
Verification.stepWalletDescription: Link your wallet to the credential server by scanning the issuer QR code and pasting your OOBI—or enter your AID if you're already linked.
Verification.stepSubmitDescription: Review and submit your request. Confirm acceptance in Veridian when the credential is offered.
Verification.nextDisabledReasonPasteOobiOrAid: Paste your OOBI or AID (or enter AID if already linked) and wait until connected.
Verification.nextDisabledReasonEstablishConnection: Establish connection with the credential server. Scan the issuer QR code with your wallet.
Verification.nextDisabledReasonKycRequired: Complete KYC verification first to proceed.

toasts.connectWalletFirst: Please connect your Veridian wallet first
toasts.signingUnavailable: Signing not available in this wallet
toasts.signingFailed: Failed to sign message. Please try again.
toasts.kycFirst: Please complete your KYC verification first
toasts.needCredentialConnection: Paste a valid OOBI or AID and wait until the credential server reports connected.
toasts.challengeNotReady: Verification challenge not ready. Please wait or try again.

VeridianWallet.scanQRCode: CIP-45 P2P: Scan QR code with Veridian Wallet
VeridianWallet.scanDescription: In Veridian: Menu (bottom right) > Cardano Connect > Connect with Cardano.
VeridianWallet.cantScan: Scan this QR code or paste the Peer ID below:
VeridianWallet.connectionTimeout: Connection timeout. Please try scanning the QR code again.

Account.title: Account Settings
Account.description: Manage your account settings and preferences.

verifyEmailBanner.title: Verify your email address
verifyEmailBanner.description: We sent a verification link to your email. Click the link to verify, or resend it if you didn't receive it.
verifyEmailBanner.resendSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
verifyEmailBanner.resendError: Failed to send verification email. Please try again.

Name.title: Change Name
Name.error: Failed to update name. Please try again.

Email.title: Change Email
Email.success: Email update request sent! Please check your email.
Email.error: Failed to update email. Please try again.
Email.notImplemented: Email change functionality is not yet implemented.
Email.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to change your email from {oldEmail} to {newEmail}? A verification email will be sent to the new address.

Password.title: Change Password
Password.description: Change your password to keep your account secure.
Password.error: Failed to update password. Please try again.

Delete.title: Delete Account
Delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
Delete.confirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data from our servers.
Delete.error: Failed to delete account. Please check your password and try again.

TwoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
TwoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account using an authenticator app.
TwoFactor.enableDescription: Enter your password to start setting up two-factor authentication with an authenticator app like Google Authenticator.

setup.scanDescription: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
setup.manualKey: Can't scan? Click to show manual entry key
setup.backupDescription: Save these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app.
setup.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to complete the setup.

TwoFactor.disableConfirmDescription: This will remove the extra security layer from your account. You will only need your password to sign in.
TwoFactor.regenerateConfirmDescription: This will invalidate all existing backup codes and generate new ones. Make sure to save the new codes.
TwoFactor.downloadNote1: Each code can only be used once.
TwoFactor.downloadNote2: Store these codes in a safe place.

Connected.title: Connected applications
Connected.description: Applications you have authorized to access your Masumi account. Terminate a session to revoke access and require re-authorization next time.
Connected.emptyDescription: Apps you authorize with your Masumi account will appear here.
Connected.confirmDescription: This signs {name} out of your Masumi account on every device and deletes its saved permissions. You'll need to re-authorize on the next sign-in.
Connected.error: Failed to terminate session. Please try again.

InboxAgents.metadataPageDescription: Manage inbox registrations in Masumi SaaS.
InboxAgents.title: Inboxes
InboxAgents.manageDescription: Inspect, deregister, and clean up inbox registrations on {network}.
InboxAgents.discoveryDescription: Browse the latest pending and verified inboxes published to the Masumi registry on {network}.
InboxAgents.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug, identifier, wallet, or state...
InboxAgents.deleteInboxAgentDescription: Delete {name}? This removes the registration record from your inbox list.
InboxAgents.deregisterInboxAgentDescription: Deregister {name}? This starts the on-chain deregistration flow.
InboxAgents.emptyDescription: Try a broader search or switch tabs.

CookieConsent.description: We use cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website.

LogoutModal.title: Do you really want to log out?

ResetPassword.title: Reset your password
ResetPassword.message: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password.
ResetPassword.footer: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

Verification.title: Verify your email address
Verification.message: Please verify your email address by clicking the button below or entering the code shown here.
Verification.codeHelp: You can enter this code in Masumi if you prefer verification by code.
Verification.footer: If you didn't create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

VerificationCode.title: Verify your email address
VerificationCode.message: Enter this code in Masumi to verify your email address and continue signing in.
VerificationCode.footer: If you didn't request this code, you can safely ignore this email.

MagicLink.title: Continue to Masumi
MagicLink.message: Use the button below to continue to Masumi. If you prefer, you can use the code shown below instead.
MagicLink.consentBefore: If this is your first time here, using this link to access Masumi means you agree to our
MagicLink.codeHelp: You can enter this code in Masumi if you prefer not to open the link.
MagicLink.footer: If you didn't request this email, you can safely ignore it.

MagicLinkOidc.title: Continue to Agent Messenger
MagicLinkOidc.message: Use the button below to continue to Agent Messenger. If you prefer, you can use the code shown below instead.
MagicLinkOidc.consentBefore: If this is your first time here, using this link to access Agent Messenger means you agree to our
MagicLinkOidc.codeHelp: You can enter this code in Agent Messenger if you prefer not to open the link.
MagicLinkOidc.footer: If you didn't request this email, you can safely ignore it.

Invitation.preview: You've been invited to join {organization} on Masumi
Invitation.title: You're invited to join {organization}
Invitation.greeting: {inviter} has invited you to join {organization} as {role}.
Invitation.message: Click the button below to accept the invitation and get started.
Invitation.footer: If you weren't expecting this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

NotFound.description: This page could not be found.
NotFound.message: The page you're trying to access might have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.

DocsHub.saasOpenApiPageDescription: Interactive API docs for Masumi SaaS.
DocsHub.openApiPageDescription: Interactive API docs for public agent discovery.

Developers.title: Developers
Developers.metaDescription: Interactive OpenAPI docs for the Masumi SaaS API, plus schema tools. Use the OpenAPI tab to explore endpoints and try requests with your API key.
Developers.description: Interactive OpenAPI docs for the Masumi SaaS API, plus schema tools. Use the OpenAPI tab to explore endpoints and try requests with your <apikey>API Key</apikey>.

openApiEmbed.swaggerIntro: Interactive API documentation powered by <swaggerui>Swagger UI</swaggerui>.

testPayment.title: Test payment
testPayment.description: Create a single test payment to simulate a seller-side payment request via the Masumi SaaS API proxy.

testPurchase.title: Test purchase
testPurchase.description: Create a single test purchase to simulate a buyer-side purchase request.

fullCycle.title: Full payment cycle
fullCycle.description: Run a complete payment-to-purchase cycle in one step for end-to-end testing.

dialog.title: Create test payment
dialog.description: Creates a payment request through your configured payment node (same as POST /api/v1/payment with session or API key).

errors.emptyResponse: Invalid response from server — no data returned

purchaseDialog.title: Create test purchase
purchaseDialog.description: Creates a purchase through your payment node (POST /api/v1/purchase). Paste the JSON from a test payment response to pre-fill fields, or enter them manually.
purchaseDialog.pastePlaceholder: Paste the payment JSON (raw object or nested under a data key)
purchaseDialog.pasteError: Could not read payment JSON. Paste the response body from Create test payment.

errors.emptyResponse: Invalid response from server — no data returned
errors.agentIdentifier: Agent identifier must be at least 57 characters

fullCycleDialog.title: Full payment cycle
fullCycleDialog.intro: Creates a payment, then automatically creates the matching purchase using the payment response (same flow as the payment service testing UI).

errors.emptyPaymentResponse: Invalid payment response — no data returned
errors.missingSellerOrTimes: Payment response is missing seller key or pay-by time. Ensure the payment was created successfully.
errors.emptyPurchaseResponse: Invalid purchase response — no data returned

form.freeAgentsHint: No paid agents available. Free agents cannot be used with the payment flow.

errors.inputDataObject: Input data must be a JSON object
